suites.title: Full Page Sweep — No Errors Anywhere

specs.title: Every route is free of ErrorBoundary crashes
No JavaScript errors thrown during full navigation
1 — Login page renders correctly when unauthenticated
2 — Login with invalid credentials shows error
3 — Login with empty email shows validation
4 — Valid admin login redirects to admin dashboard

specs.title: F13. Full participant journey via API setup
1. Admin dashboard loads — form list and New Form button visible
2. Empty admin dashboard — verify empty state handling
3. Form list item — verify title, participant count, round, actions
4. Create form page — template picker / creation interface visible
5. Fill and create form — verify form appears in list
6. Duplicate join code — verify error handling
7. Form editor loads — question editing UI visible
8. Edit questions — modify text, verify save reflects changes
9. Delete form — verify removal from list
10. Summary page loads — round info, response count, synthesis area
